Scenario: Verify all active tasks are listed in the Task Bar
Steps:
1. Start multiple migrations and backups
2. Open Task Bar
ExpectedResult: All running tasks visible in the list

Scenario: Verify completed tasks appear in Task Bar history
Steps:
1. Complete a migration
2. Open Task Bar
ExpectedResult: Completed task visible with Completed status

Scenario: Verify Task Bar shows correct task type (Migration / Backup / Restore)
Steps:
1. Run one migration and one backup
2. Open Task Bar
ExpectedResult: Each task shows correct type icon and label

Scenario: Verify Task Bar shows task source and destination
Steps:
1. Start a migration
2. Open Task Bar
ExpectedResult: Source and destination paths shown for the task

Scenario: Verify Task Bar updates without manual page refresh
Steps:
1. Start a task
2. Watch Task Bar without refreshing page

Scenario: Verify progress percentage shown for running tasks
Steps:
1. Start a migration
2. Open Task Bar during execution

Scenario: Verify progress bar updates in real time
Steps:
1. Start a large migration
2. Watch progress bar in Task Bar
ExpectedResult: Bar fills progressively as files are processed

Steps:
1. Start a task
2. Observe Task Bar
ExpectedResult: Shows X of Y files processed

Scenario: Verify estimated time remaining shown for running tasks
Steps:
1. Start a migration
2. Check Task Bar

Scenario: Verify Pause button is available for running tasks
Steps:
1. Start a migration
2. Open Task Bar
ExpectedResult: Pause button visible for Running tasks

Scenario: Verify task pauses when Pause is clicked
Steps:
1. Start migration
2. Click Pause in Task Bar

Scenario: Verify Resume button available for paused tasks
Steps:
1. Pause a task
2. Check Task Bar
ExpectedResult: Resume button visible for Paused tasks

Scenario: Verify task resumes when Resume is clicked
ExpectedResult: Task resumes from where it was paused

Scenario: Verify Cancel button available for running tasks
Steps:
1. Start a task
2. Open Task Bar
ExpectedResult: Cancel button visible for Running tasks

Scenario: Verify task stops when Cancel is clicked
Steps:
1. Start a task
2. Click Cancel in Task Bar
ExpectedResult: Task stops — status updated to Cancelled/Stopped

Scenario: Verify Retry available for failed tasks
Steps:
1. Trigger a failed task
2. Open Task Bar
ExpectedResult: Retry button visible for Failed tasks

Scenario: Verify in-app notification shown when task completes
Steps:
1. Start and complete a task
2. Watch for notification
ExpectedResult: Toast or notification shown on completion

Scenario: Verify in-app notification shown when task fails
Verify notification links to task details
ExpectedResult: Opens task details or report page
